domain_id.description: Domain ID linked to the blocklist.

created_at.description: Date and time of the blocklist creation. (RFC 3339 format)

updated_at.description: Date and time of the blocklist's last update. (RFC 3339 format)

ends_at.description: Date and time when the blocklist ends. Empty if the blocklist has no end. (RFC 3339 format)

type.description: Type of block for this email.

values.unknown_type: If unspecified, the type of blocklist is unknown by default
values.mailbox_full: The recipient's mailbox is full and cannot receive any new email
values.mailbox_not_found: The recipient's mailbox does not exist

custom.description: True if this blocklist was created manually. False for an automatic Transactional Email blocklist.
